What are the most effective techniques for mitigating the communication overhead associated with large-scale Tensor Parallelism, particularly in heterogeneous memory systems?
Can we design novel architectures that inherently leverage the strengths of both Tensor Parallelism and MoE, leading to improved scaling efficiency?
How can we better understand and quantify the impact of data distribution across different parallelism strategies on the overall performance of LLMs?
